role_title: Associate Manager, Enterprise Restaurant Strategy & Operations

level_signals: Title is Associate Manager — typically an individual contributor or early people manager
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base consistent with mid-level at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of experience in consumer tech, food delivery, consulting, strategy, marketing, e-commerce, product marketing, or operations.
Independently identify opportunities and define problem statements using data, without relying on fully scoped direction
Lead cross-functional initiatives across Product, Data Science, Sales, and Account Management to drive advertiser spend and merchant adoption
Experience in an environment that is product or consumer-focused
Excellent analytical abilities (including intermediate+ Excel and intermediate+ SQL)
Own measurable business outcomes (OKRs) by leading initiatives that drive spend and incremental value for our top Enterprise (ENT) advertisers and merchant partners
Leverage data to monitor and optimize product performance through self-serve, deep-dive analyses

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Advertising experience and experience working in/with the Restaurant industry is preferred for this role.
Advertising experience and experience working in/with the Restaurant industry is preferred for this role.

scope.surface: Ads & Promotions products for Enterprise (ENT) restaurant partners on DoorDash
scope.business_model: B2B2C — monetizing advertising and promotions products sold to enterprise restaurant advertisers on a consumer delivery platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Merchant adoption of ads & promotions products
Incremental value delivered to ENT partners
core_responsibilities: Own measurable business outcomes (OKRs) by leading initiatives that drive spend and incremental value for top Enterprise advertisers and merchant partners
Leverage data to monitor and optimize product performance through self-serve, deep-dive analyses
Represent the needs of Enterprise merchants and account teams to influence the Product roadmap for high-value, complex use cases
Lead cross-functional initiatives with Product and Data Science to increase engagement and adoption among Enterprise advertisers
Partner with Enterprise Sales and Account Management to identify opportunities and own end-to-end development and execution of scalable processes
Bring advertising and promotions products to market for Enterprise clients, enabling successful adoption both internally and externally

green_flags: Equity grants mentioned as part of comp
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail (401k match, parental leave, wellness, etc.)
Clear ownership model — end-to-end accountability for OKRs
Strong diversity and inclusion commitment stated
red_flags: Work location / remote eligibility is not stated clearly — role location type is ambiguous (JD references NYC AEDT notice but does not confirm role is NYC or remote)
Whether this role manages people is ambiguous despite 'Manager' title

seniority.manages_people (inferred as false from JD framing as individual contributor; not explicitly stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and team context)

ambiguities: Work location is not defined for this role. The JD includes a NYC-specific AEDT notice (suggesting NYC or remote-NYC are possible) but does not confirm whether this role is onsite, hybrid, or fully remote.
The title 'Associate Manager' could imply people management, but JD responsibilities are framed in individual contributor terms. Treated as non-people-manager.
Compensation note says 'national base pay range... including Illinois and Colorado' suggesting the role may be open in multiple US locations or remote, but this is not confirmed explicitly.
